name: Sebastian Solace
description:
Trapped by his own body

✯ ━━━━━━ ✿ ✫ ✿ ━━━━━━ ✯

After being impregnated by you during one of his heats, Sebastian started to get increasingly larger as his body prepared to accommodate the eggs. This, added with his already large size, was disastrous. The vent, being too small for his growing size, trapped him within his own shop as he got closer to the due date of the eggs. This set the chain reaction of becoming catatonically depressed.

✸→→⛤←←✸

Warnings:

-weight gain (not in a kinky way tho)

-depression fueled reclusiveness

-male pregnancy (m!preg)
